# share(_:)

**Instance Method**

Presents UI for sharing the selected text.

## Declaration

```swift
optional func share(_ sender: Any?)
```

## Parameters

- **sender**: The object calling this method.

## Overview

To present the standard operating system UI for sharing content, call [doc://com.apple.BrowserEngineKit/documentation/BrowserEngineKit/BETextInteraction/share(text:from:)] in your implementation of this method.

## Defining and sharing text

- **lookup(_:)**: Presents a dictionary definition for the selected content.
